hero.label: Personalised Skincare
hero.heading: Your Skin, Understood
hero.subheading: Take our 60-second quiz and get a skincare routine matched to your skin

how_it_works.heading: How It Works
how_it_works.step_1_text: Answer quick questions about your skin type, concerns, and current routine
how_it_works.step_2_text: We’ll match you with a 2–4 product routine built for your skin
how_it_works.step_3_text: Your routine ships directly to your door

goals.heading: Explore by Concern
goals.acne_desc: Clear breakouts and calm blemish-prone skin
goals.anti_aging_desc: Smooth fine lines and support firmness
goals.hydration_desc: Relieve tightness and plump dehydrated skin
goals.brightening_desc: Fade dark spots and even out tone
goals.sensitive_desc: Calm reactive skin with gentle formulas
